name: galactic-shrine/gsid
description: GsId 256-bit identifier system for Galactic-Shrine projects.

suggest.doctrine/dbal: Required to use the optional GsId Doctrine DBAL type.
suggest.symfony/framework-bundle: Required to use the optional GsId Symfony bundle integration.
suggest.symfony/config: Required to use the optional GsId Symfony configuration tree.
suggest.symfony/dependency-injection: Required to use the optional GsId Symfony extension.
suggest.symfony/http-kernel: Required to use the optional GsId Symfony bundle and kernel request listener.
